title: Server: expand content-type inference + add raw-bytes document endpoint
description:
Extend crates/server/src/routes.rs to support non-Markdown artifacts. Part of story abfd6016 (multi-format doc rendering). Unblocks task eeafaa78 (HtmlRenderer).

## Implementation

1. infer_content_type() (line ~340) recognizes .html / .htm → text/html.
2. New route GET /api/issues/:id/documents/:path/raw returns file bytes with Content-Type set on the HTTP response (not JSON-wrapped). Reuses executor.read_document_content() for path and commit resolution.
3. Symmetric GET /api/documents/raw?path=…&commit=… for path-only access (mirrors get_document_by_path at line ~268).
4. Raw endpoints set a Content-Security-Policy response header permitting https: so CDN-hosted assets (reveal.js from jsdelivr) work through the iframe.
5. Tests in the existing server test module cover: text/html inference; raw endpoint success with correct bytes and Content-Type; 404 on missing document; CSP header present; path-only variant.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] infer_content_type("x.html") and infer_content_type("x.htm") both return "text/html"; existing extensions (.md, .txt, .json) unchanged — covered by a unit test.
- [ ] GET /api/issues/:id/documents/:path/raw returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type: text/html and body equal to the file bytes for a .html fixture linked to an issue — covered by an integration test.
- [ ] That same endpoint returns HTTP 404 when the document is not linked to the issue — covered by a test.
- [ ] The raw response includes a Content-Security-Policy response header permitting https: — covered by a test asserting the header.
- [ ] GET /api/documents/raw?path=<.html fixture> returns the same Content-Type and body — covered by a test.
- [ ] Existing get_document_content endpoint behavior is unchanged — no regression in existing tests.
- [ ] cargo-ci gate passes (cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -D warnings && cargo test --workspace all green).
- [ ] code-review gate passes.
